title: Team News: Norway vs. Senegal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs | World Cup 2026 - Sports Mole
original_text:
Clashing for just the second time after a 2006 friendly, Norway and Senegal do battle in the early hours of Tuesday morning in World Cup 2026 Group I.

The Scandinavians will qualify for the last 32 with a win thanks to their 4-1 beating of Iraq on matchday one, when the Lions of Teranga were conversely overcome 3-1 by France .

Here, Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest team news for both sides.

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Mendy; Diatta, Koulibaly, Niakhate, Diouf; Camara, I. Gueye, P. Gueye; Sarr, Jackson, Mane

Get FREE daily news and in-depth previews for games from the biggest leagues and competitions in world football — straight to your inbox.
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
